Documentation.Summary: The underlying <see cref="T:Sandbox.Rendering.CommandList" /> used for rendering.

2D Drawing functions for a <see cref="T:Sandbox.Rendering.CommandList" />.
<para><c>HudPainter</c> provides a set of methods for drawing shapes, textures, and text onto a command list, typically for HUD or UI rendering.
</para>
